UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the Sunshine application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the application, always 'user'.

saldoUSDT.description: The user's available wallet balance in USDT, used for making new investments.

totalInvested.description: The sum of all active investments a user currently has.

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language for the application interface (e.g., 'es', 'en').

termsAccepted.description: Indicates if the user has accepted the 'Términos y Condiciones de Inversión de Sunshine'.

invitationCodeUsedId.description: Reference to the sponsor's UserProfile ID.

ultimoCheckIn.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the user's last daily check-in.

walletAddress.description: The user's unique USDT (BEP-20) wallet address.

bonoDirecto.description: The accumulated amount of direct referral bonuses in USDT.

hasUnclaimedBonuses.description: Flag indicating if the user has made a new investment that the sponsor can claim a bonus for.

fechaRegistro.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of when the user account was created.

lastConsolidation.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the last time earnings were consolidated.

isVip.description: Indicates if the user has a VIP plan with enhanced rates. Defaults to false.

Investment.title: Investment
Investment.description: Represents a single active investment plan for a user.

startDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the investment was activated.

dailyRate.description: The daily percentage rate for this investment (e.g., 0.02 for 2%).

earningsGenerated.description: Total earnings generated by this specific investment.

status.description: The current status of the investment.

bonusPaid.description: Whether the direct referral bonus for this investment has been paid out.

InvitationCode.title: InvitationCode
InvitationCode.description: Represents a legacy invitation code. This is being phased out.

InviteCodeMap.title: InviteCodeMap
InviteCodeMap.description: Maps a user's unique invite code to their user ID.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a single financial transaction in a user's history.

definition.description: Stores individual investment plans for a user.
Stores the transaction history for a single user.
Stores unique wallet addresses to prevent multi-accounting.
Maps a user's public invite code to their UID for sponsor lookups.

firestore.reasoning: The structure is updated to support multiple investments per user via a subcollection. The UserProfile is simplified, removing single-plan fields and repurposing saldoUSDT as the main wallet balance.
